calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Continued To Sep-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for (executrix) Cindia Deng.

Mr. Mangini reported that there are no assets, that decedent died in a boat accident, that they filed the petition to deal with a creditors claim, that they rejected the claim, that there was a wrongful death action filed in Federal Court, that he believes but is not sure if it has settled yet and that once it is settled they will file a petition to terminate. The status on filing a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a status report was continued to September 27, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that counsel must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a status report prior to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Continued To Aug-31-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Chris Anderson for Jin Guan (Petitioner). John Mangini for Cindia Deng (Petitioner).

The Court denied Mr. Guan's Petition for Letters of Administration and granted Ms. Deng's Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. The will is admitted to probate.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
